runtime_math.strict: rch exec -- env FRANKENLIBC_MODE=strict cargo bench -p frankenlibc-bench --bench runtime_math_bench -- --noplot
runtime_math.hardened: rch exec -- env FRANKENLIBC_MODE=hardened cargo bench -p frankenlibc-bench --bench runtime_math_bench -- --noplot

membrane.strict: FRANKENLIBC_MODE=strict FRANKENLIBC_BENCH_PIN=1 CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/rch_target_frankenlibc_bd_bp8fl_8_2_stage_strict RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=FRANKENLIBC_MODE,FRANKENLIBC_BENCH_PIN,CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec -- cargo bench -p frankenlibc-bench --bench membrane_bench -- --noplot
membrane.hardened: FRANKENLIBC_MODE=hardened FRANKENLIBC_BENCH_PIN=1 CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/rch_target_frankenlibc_bd_bp8fl_8_2_stage_hardened RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=FRANKENLIBC_MODE,FRANKENLIBC_BENCH_PIN,CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec -- cargo bench -p frankenlibc-bench --bench membrane_bench -- --noplot

string.strict: FRANKENLIBC_MODE=strict FRANKENLIBC_BENCH_PIN=1 CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenlibc-pearlforest-bd-b92jd-2-1-string-strict-filtered RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=FRANKENLIBC_MODE,FRANKENLIBC_BENCH_PIN,CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec -- cargo bench -p frankenlibc-bench --bench string_bench -- --noplot 'memcpy|strlen'
string.hardened: FRANKENLIBC_MODE=hardened FRANKENLIBC_BENCH_PIN=1 CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenlibc-pearlforest-bd-b92jd-2-1-string-hardened RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=FRANKENLIBC_MODE,FRANKENLIBC_BENCH_PIN,CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec -- cargo bench -p frankenlibc-bench --bench string_bench -- --noplot 'memcpy|strlen'

malloc.strict: FRANKENLIBC_MODE=strict FRANKENLIBC_BENCH_PIN=1 CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenlibc-pearlforest-bd-b92jd-2-1-malloc-strict RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=FRANKENLIBC_MODE,FRANKENLIBC_BENCH_PIN,CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec -- cargo bench -p frankenlibc-bench --bench malloc_bench -- --noplot 'alloc_free_cycle|alloc_burst'
malloc.hardened: FRANKENLIBC_MODE=hardened FRANKENLIBC_BENCH_PIN=1 CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenlibc-pearlforest-bd-b92jd-2-1-malloc-hardened RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=FRANKENLIBC_MODE,FRANKENLIBC_BENCH_PIN,CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec -- cargo bench -p frankenlibc-bench --bench malloc_bench -- --noplot 'alloc_free_cycle|alloc_burst'
